notes: 8x8 overview for SG digital bereavement platform. Segments span religion x urgency x wealth. Needs mix price, ritual authenticity, digital fluency, post-bereavement admin support.

us_scores_rationale.Price accessibility: S$3,500-12K vs premium parlours S$15-30K — genuinely the cheaper digital path
us_scores_rationale.Digital-first ordering: End-to-end online order / casket / rites / hearse booking — no competitor ships full digital funnel
us_scores_rationale.Ritual authenticity (rites): Multi-faith priest coordination; Buddhist / Christian / Taoist / Muslim rites partner network
us_scores_rationale.Post-funeral admin workflow: Unique in SG: CPF claim assist, bank account closure, ACRA estate, MyTax — bundled
us_scores_rationale.Livestream / memorial page: Every package includes wake livestream + perpetual memorial page
us_scores_rationale.Grief-sensitive UX: Serif + gold palette; no upsell guilt; emotional language tested with bereavement counsellors
us_scores_rationale.Speed to set-up (<24h): Same-day wake setup for Buddhist/Christian workflows via integrated partner network
us_scores_rationale.Multi-faith coverage: Buddhist + Christian + Taoist + secular — weaker on Muslim (Islamic rites have fixed community partnerships)
